name: avadbeta
description: AI builder plugin — strategy, review, design, QA, security, headless browser, deploy, and retrospectives.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-landing review and root-cause investigation skills with avad voice and discipline.
interface.longDescription: Avad packages serious-engineering AI workflows into a small set of named skills. The shipped surface today is /avadbeta-review (pre-landing review against the diff), /avadbeta-investigate (root-cause debugging), and /avadbeta-help (a read-only listing of shipped vs planned skills). Each skill ships with explicit voice rules, a completion protocol, and fix-first debugging discipline so behavior stays predictable across sessions. Run /avadbeta-help inside Codex for the current shipped-vs-planned listing.
